g.text: Interpretation: inhibition produced a reproducible directional arithmetic effect, but the matched no-carry effect was nearly as large.

text.style: font-size: 7.2px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #5f6b76

g.text: The panel is therefore carry-associated at discovery, not an identified abstract carry variable. Solid arrows are retained graph edges; dotted input paths compress displayed token edges.
